patch:
diff --git a/csrc/dispatch_utils.h b/csrc/dispatch_utils.h
index 6d798e6..7eca3bc 100644
--- a/csrc/dispatch_utils.h
+++ b/csrc/dispatch_utils.h
@@ -27,6 +27,9 @@
   } else if (head_dim == 128) {                                 \
     constexpr int HEAD_DIM = 128;                               \
     __VA_ARGS__                                                 \
+  } else if (head_dim == 256) {                                 \
+    constexpr int HEAD_DIM = 256;                               \
+    __VA_ARGS__                                                 \
   } else {                                                      \
     std::ostringstream err_msg;                                 \
     err_msg << "Unsupported head dim: " << int(head_dim);       \
diff --git a/sageattention/core.py b/sageattention/core.py
index 4fc2509..4e4730b 100644
--- a/sageattention/core.py
+++ b/sageattention/core.py
@@ -262,7 +262,11 @@ def sageattn_qk_int8_pv_fp16_triton(
         q = torch.nn.functional.pad(q, (0, 128 - head_dim_og))
         k = torch.nn.functional.pad(k, (0, 128 - head_dim_og))
         v = torch.nn.functional.pad(v, (0, 128 - head_dim_og))
-    elif head_dim_og > 128:
+    elif head_dim_og > 128 and head_dim_og < 256:
+        q = torch.nn.functional.pad(q, (0, 256 - head_dim_og))
+        k = torch.nn.functional.pad(k, (0, 256 - head_dim_og))
+        v = torch.nn.functional.pad(v, (0, 256 - head_dim_og))
+    elif head_dim_og > 256:
         raise ValueError(f"Unsupported head_dim: {head_dim_og}")
 
     # assert last dim is contiguous
_reconstruction_warnings: op[12] edit: old text not found in csrc/fused/fused.cu

_extraction.source: messages_replay against original_session.json (post Fix-B WRITE/EDIT tool aliases)
